message:
fix: three P1 bugs — wrong db target, case-sensitive parse, slot leak

- sling_helpers: add missing Dir to bd update command so rig-specific
  beads are updated in the correct database
- witness/handlers: use lowercased line consistently in getCleanupStatus
  to prevent case mismatch from skipping cleanup_status extraction
- refinery/engineer: release merge slot on conflict-resolution task
  creation failure to prevent permanent slot blockage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
